name: Talked to insurance adjuster already about my sprain in Millcreek, did I mess up?

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster already about my sprain in Millcreek, did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.text: May hurt but fixable; lawyer reviews, halts further talks.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly, adjusters seek statements to deny/lowball; avoid more without lawyer.[2] Stick to facts given.[2] Key factors: don't give recorded statement alone; they twist words; early talk risks claim.[2] Stop contact, consult attorney to counter any issues, protect remaining value.[3] Common mistake fixable.

description: May hurt but fixable; lawyer reviews, halts further talks.[2]
